summary: Iteration 48 - TV Dashboard NOC Improvements Testing Complete. All new features verified: 1) Adaptive grid with tv-grid-xl class for 1-2 clients (larger cards), 2) Semaforo visual indicator (radial gradient glow top-right, amber for 75% health), 3) Consumabili Bassi/Toner panel with 4 items showing percentage bars, 4) Alert device names show 'Sconosciuto' instead of raw UUID for orphan device_ids, 5) Health ring enlarged to 64px, metric numbers at 22px. All 10 required features verified working.

tv_dashboard_access: TV Dashboard loads at /tv without authentication
No login required - direct access works
adaptive_grid: Grid uses tv-grid-xl class for 1-2 clients (minmax 480px = larger cards)
Client card fills available space appropriately
semaforo_visual: Semaforo indicator present on client card (data-testid='tv-semaforo-{id}')
Radial gradient glow from top-right corner
toner_panel: 4 toner items displayed with percentage bars
Magenta Toner W2033A: 10% (HP Color LaserJet M479fdw - Ufficio)
Black Toner TN-436BK: 5% (Brother MFC-L8900CDW - Sala Riunioni)
Color-coded bars based on level_pct and color_hex
alert_device_names: Alert rows show device name or 'Sconosciuto' (not raw UUID)
8 alerts displayed with severity labels (CRIT, HIGH, MED, LOW)
Each alert shows: severity, device_name, message, time_ago
'Sconosciuto' shown for orphan device_ids (expected with test data)
global_status: Shows 'ATTENZIONE' in red when offline devices exist
tv-status-critical class applied with pulsing animation
stats_bar: 6 metrics displayed: Dispositivi (12), Online (9), Offline (3), Critici (4), Alert (8), Incidenti (2)
Offline and Critici show red with pulse animation
offline_panel: 3 offline devices shown with red pulse indicators
Each device shows: name, IP, client_name, down_since
Red pulse animation: 1s ease-in-out infinite tv-blink
footer_ticker: LIVE indicator visible with red background

critical_code_review_comments: Adaptive grid correctly switches between tv-grid-xl/lg/md/sm based on client count
Semaforo visual uses radial-gradient for subtle glow effect (green/amber/red based on health_pct)
Backend properly enriches alerts with device_id lookup when device_name/device_ip missing
Fallback to 'Sconosciuto' for orphan device_ids is correct behavior
Health ring and metric numbers sized appropriately for TV display (64px ring, 22px numbers)

success_rate.backend: 100% - /api/tv/dashboard returns correct data with enriched alerts and toner info
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All TV Dashboard iteration 48 features verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified TV Dashboard NOC improvements. Current state: 1 client (86BIT_Office, 75% health), 12 devices (9 online, 3 offline), 8 alerts (4 critical), 4 low toner items. Key features: adaptive grid (tv-grid-xl for 1-2 clients), semaforo visual (amber glow for 75% health), toner panel with percentage bars, alert device names show 'Sconosciuto' for orphan device_ids. All data-testid attributes present. No authentication required for /tv.
